2228440.name: World of Haiku Demo
2228440.description:
In this demonstration, you will learn how to use the World of Haiku platform to grow your cybersecurity knowledge and hone your hacker skills. World of Haiku is an immersive cyberpunk experience that teaches you real-world hacking skills and tools as you advance through the game missions. This free demo could be your first step in achieving your goals in cybersecurity and starting on your way to becoming a professional hacker.

learn Skills Like:
  • Nmap
  • John the Ripper
  • Hydra
  • Iptables
  • other Linux Basics
